examples.title: Algorithm: Lexical Analysis
examples.description: Breaking text into tokens based on a set of rules
examples.code:
ALGORITHM LexicalAnalysis
INPUT: sourceCode, rules
OUTPUT: tokens

BEGIN
 FOR EACH character IN sourceCode
 IF character matches rule
 CREATE token
 ADD token TO tokens
 RETURN tokens
END
